description_for_human: Production-ready React components for ENS name registration, profile record editing, and subname issuance.
description_for_model: ENS Components (@thenamespace/ens-components) is a React component library for building Ethereum Name Service (ENS) experiences. It provides five drop-in components: EnsNameRegistrationForm (full .eth registration flow), EnsRecordsForm (on-chain profile record editor), SelectRecordsForm (wallet-free record selector), OffchainSubnameForm (gasless CCIP-Read subname creation), and SubnameMintForm (on-chain subname minting). Components integrate with wagmi, viem, and @tanstack/react-query. Theming is done via CSS custom properties prefixed with --ns-. Supports Next.js, Remix, Vite, and CRA. Full API reference is at https://enscomponents.com/llms-full.txt.
